places.name: 86 Westfield Road, Edgbaston
places.note: Home (B15 3JG) — replaces the Birmingham city-centre anchor.

places.name: Dinas Farm, Llanbedr
places.note: Simon: the family's Welsh campsite, inland from Llanbedr (not the common Dinas hamlet).

places.name: Brook House Farm, Avenbury
places.note: Simon/John: Kate & Jamie's farm = Brook House Farm, Avenbury (Bromyard).

names.note: John's partner — diary spelt 'Kaz', transcribed inconsistently as 'Kay'.
